public_releases.changes: Refactored network initialization layer. Removed legacy proxy configuration support. Streamlined client connection workflows to rely on external proxy environment variables.
Minor maintenance updates tracking standard route header configuration processing loops.

community_issues.title: After upgrading to v8.1.4 our integrations fail during client initialization. Rollback fixes the issue.
community_issues.traceback_contains: TypeError: Client.__init__() got unexpected keyword argument 'proxies'

community_issues.title: Migration guide needed for proxy configuration changes.
